title: brodiaea hendersonii
intro: Brodiaea hendersonii, also known as Henderson's brodiaea or giant brodiaea, is a perennial plant species in the family Asparagaceae, native to the western United States. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Brodiaea hendersonii include reducing swelling, promoting tissue repair, and supporting immune function, making it a useful treatment for various skin conditions and injuries. Brodiaea hendersonii can be prepared as a tincture or salve, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and skin health.
